'''Goyoikin''' was the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Ventooine/Legends|Ventooine]], located on the only inhabited continent of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. A large [[Gold/Legends|golden]] statue of [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] stood in the ruins of what was once the temple of the ruling [[Satab]], erected by the grateful population in thanks for his efforts in overthrowing the [[Satab (individual)|last Satab]]. The city was also home to the [[Hall of Satabs]].

{{City-stub}}
